overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a rainy, gaslit historic city street at night. The character navigates wet cobblestone roads with tram tracks, passing ornate buildings with balconies and storefronts in a atmospheric, foggy environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with tram tracks and wooden sidewalks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet cobblestone street between historic buildings, passing wooden sidewalks and storefronts

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the wooden sidewalk near a building entrance

entered.detail: wooden plank sidewalk with support posts running along the building front
metal tram tracks embedded in the cobblestone street surface
two-story historic buildings with balconies and warm lit windows
cast iron street lamp with warm glowing light illuminating the rain
wooden wagon cart parked on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow, rain-soaked historic street at night, flanked by wooden sidewalks and two-story buildings with glowing windows. Metal tram tracks run down the center of the cobblestone road, and a lone figure sits on the left sidewalk near a parked wooden cart. Gas lamps cast warm light through the rain and fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic intersection and cross street with ornate stone architecture

events.description: character completes a right turn at the intersection onto a cross street with more ornate architecture

agents.ego_description: turns right at the intersection and continues walking down the cross street with ornate stone buildings

entered.detail: historic stone buildings with iron balconies and arched windows
historic buildings with decorative facades and second-floor balconies

segments.scene_description: After turning right at the intersection, the character proceeds down a cross street lined with more ornate stone buildings featuring iron balconies. The wooden sidewalks and cart from the previous street are left behind, while the tram tracks fade into the distance on the left. The rain continues to fall on the cobblestone street.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic street with taverns and parked carriage

events.description: Doyle's Tavern building becomes visible on the left side of the street
character passes close by a red horse-drawn carriage parked on the right

agents.ego_description: walking past Doyle's Tavern and a parked carriage, continuing down the wet historic street

notable_agents.action: red horse-drawn carriage parked on the side of the street

entered.detail: two-story building with 'Doyle's Tavern' painted sign on the upper facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks toward and past Doyle's Tavern, a prominent two-story building with a painted sign on the left. A red horse-drawn carriage is parked on the right side of the street, which the character passes closely. The street continues with ornate historic buildings on both sides, illuminated by gas lamps in the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked historic city at night, transitioning from a narrow residential lane into a more ornate commercial district. It begins by following a character down a cobblestone street flanked by wooden sidewalks and glowing windows, where gas lamps cast a warm light through the fog over metal tram tracks and a parked wooden cart. As the character turns right at an intersection, the scene shifts toward a cross street lined with stone buildings and iron balconies, leaving the tram tracks and wooden walkways behind. The camera then proceeds past the painted sign of Doyle's Tavern on the left and a red horse-drawn carriage on the right, finally moving deeper into the rainy night amidst a row of illuminated historic facades.
